Our evidence packet is ready — handing it to Agent B for review.
Round 1: adversarial review
We're checking Agent A's evidence against the rubric. We never see the chart ourselves — only what A quoted, plus outside records like the pharmacy's if we need them.
Acting as the nurse, we called up the pharmacy's dispense records to see what was actually filled — 8 record(s) on file.
We have no objections — the evidence holds up under the rubric.
CONFIRMED_WORSENING
We're writing a plain-language text message to the patient about what happens next…

Hi, this is a note from your skin care team. We took a careful look at your recent visits, and even though you've been taking your medication just as prescribed, your psoriasis looks more active. We'd like to see you soon to adjust your treatment plan. Please call us or use the portal to schedule a visit. — your dermatology care team
